title: The workshop preview - what 90 minutes actually covers
copy:
Workshop is in 2 days. Here's the agenda - exactly what 90 minutes covers.

1. Live demo: an agent built in front of you, real prompts, real errors.
2. Chat vs Agents - why your chatbot pilot stalled.
3. The agent loop (Observe → Think → Act) and the 4 components.
4. Context engineering beats prompt engineering.
5. Skills as SOPs for AI - the trick that makes agents reusable.
6. The GF agent ecosystem - Otto, Molly, Carlos, Camila, Viktor, Brain. Real workflows, not slides.
7. Tool comparison: N8N vs Claude Code vs OpenClaw. Readiness vs Power chart.
8. Exercise: design your own agent in 7 minutes.
9. Next steps.

This is the same agenda I use when a client asks 'where do we even start with AI'. If that's you, comment 'workshop' - I'll DM you the link.
cta: Comment 'workshop' for the link - the April 14 session has 28/30 spots filled
